name: wf_cnn_expanding_fold74_restart
description: Resume WF CNN expanding window from fold_74 checkpoint (folds 76-84 invalid, clean restart required)

name: c7_tp8_z25_fillsim_neptune_validation
description: CRITICAL: Validate C7 TP8/z>2.5 on Neptune full fill_sim (with SL). Jupiter showed Sortino=2.768 -- confirm on Neptune's more accurate fill model. Config: book_predstdExit_conv2.0_vol70, TP8, hold_ms=600000, z>2.5, limit entry.

name: c1_z20_fillsim_neptune_validation
description: Validate C1 z>2.0 on Neptune fill_sim with SL. Jupiter Sortino=2.046 -- confirm. Config: book_predstdExit_conv2.0, TP6, hold_ms=600000, z>2.0, limit entry.

name: meta_model_gate_v2_retrain_neptune
description: Retrain LGBM meta-gate on Neptune with all current OOT embeddings. Baseline: IC lift +30%. Add temporal CNN z-score features from Razer (razer_q3_001). Expected lift: +5-10% additional.

name: fold74_decay_oot_extended
description: Extended OOT decay test: fold_74 model on all data after training cutoff. Prior: IC=0.115 over 92 days. Extend to 150+ days to confirm durability. Flag degradation > 20%.

name: monte_carlo_c7_c1_validated_sortinos
description: Monte Carlo validation for C7 (Sortino=2.768) and C1 (Sortino=2.046). 1000 bootstrap samples, confirm Sortino > 1.5 at 95th percentile. Required before paper deploy.

name: wider_cnn_ic_by_horizon_sweep
description: IC decay analysis: how does WiderCNN IC decay from 10s to 5min? Compute Spearman IC of existing OOT preds against 10s/30s/60s/120s/300s targets. Shows exactly where signal is still valuable.

name: cnn_embed_temporal_stack_pilot_lgbm
description: EXP-TS-001: LGBM on lagged CNN embeddings. Use existing OOT embedding arrays (512-dim per bar). Add lag-1/5/10/30 embeddings + MBO. Test if temporal embedding sequence predicts 30s+ outcomes. CPU-only, 4h runtime.

name: mfe_mae_multihorizon_cnn_neptune
description: CNN multi-horizon training: add auxiliary loss heads for 30s, 60s, 120s alongside primary 10s head. Tests if shared backbone learns richer features. Full WF expanding window on Neptune.

name: regime_gated_card_deployment_analysis
description: Analyze card performance conditioned on regime classifier output. Which cards perform best in trending vs mean-reverting regimes? Guides regime-conditional deployment (only deploy card X in regime Y).

name: adversarial_fill_sim_worst_case
description: Adversarial fill sim: worst-case fills for C7 and C1. Assume 50% fill rate on limit orders, worst-quartile spread, 2x normal slippage. Validate Sortino > 1.0 in adversarial conditions.

name: cross_horizon_feature_engineering_neptune
description: Cross-horizon feature engineering: compute return at 30s, 60s, 120s, 300s from existing mid_price data. Adds new training targets for next-gen models. Saves as enriched NPZ files for rapid experiment iteration.

name: wider_cnn_wf_full_clean_after_fold74
description: Complete WF CNN run after fold_74 restart finishes. Should reach fold 90-100 with clean expanding window (no warm-start contamination). Final production model candidate.

name: WiderCNN expanding window WF training
description: WiderCNN expanding window WF training -- auto-launched from queue
